channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Marcos Calls for Bayanihan Amid Fuel Price Crisis and Middle East Tensions
item.description: Amid rising fuel prices due to ongoing conflicts in the Middle East, President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has urged Filipinos to embrace the spirit of bayanihan, a Filipino tradition of communal cooperation...

item.title: St John Rigby College reports isolated suspected meningitis case unrelated to Kent outbreak with declining cases
item.description: St John Rigby College in Orrell has reported a single suspected meningococcal meningitis case among its students, but authorities confirm it is unrelated to the ongoing outbreak in Kent. The college p...

item.title: Military Experts: Power Infrastructure Targetable Under Specific Legal Conditions
item.description: In the context of the escalating Iran-US-Israel conflict, military experts have clarified that power infrastructure can be lawfully targeted under international humanitarian law if it meets strict cri...

item.title: Donald Trump deploys ICE agents to US airports for mass immigration arrests
item.description: Donald Trump has announced plans to send ICE agents into US airports starting Monday to arrest 'all illegal immigrants'. In a post on Truth Social, the president praised ICE agents as 'brilliant and p...

item.title: How Teens Can Create Their Own Summer Jobs When Hiring Is Scarce
item.description: In this opinion piece, Toronto-based financial planner Anita Bruinsma discusses the rising difficulty teenagers and young adults face in finding summer jobs. With youth unemployment above pre-pandemic...

item.title: Awoniyi helps Nottingham Forest secure 3-0 win over Tottenham to move away from relegation
item.description: Taiwo Awoniyi don score one goal as Nottingham Forest waka enter 3-0 win against Tottenham Hotspur for Premier League on Sunday. The win don help dem reduce di wahala wey dey for relegation. Forest pl...

item.title: Mofokeng’s hat-trick powers Pirates to dominant win over TS Galaxy
item.description: Relebohile Mofokeng delivered a standout performance on Sunday evening as Orlando Pirates cruised to a 6–0 victory over a 10-man TS Galaxy at Mbombela Stadium. Just two days after being unveiled as th...

item.title: Indian censor board blocks release of Palestinian film ‘The Voice of Hind Rajab’ over diplomatic concerns
item.description: The Indian Central Board of Film Certification (CBFC) has refused to clear Tunisian filmmaker Kaouther Ben Hania’s Oscar-nominated docufiction *The Voice of Hind Rajab* for theatrical release in India...

item.title: The Impact of AI on the Writer’s Voice: Predictive Text and Creativity
item.description: As AI-driven technologies such as predictive text and generative systems like ChatGPT and Gemini become ubiquitous, the question arises: How will these tools impact the unique voice of writers? These ...

item.title: Albanese seeks stable fuel supply amid Middle East conflict and sanctions debate
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese has begun diplomatic efforts to ensure Australia maintains a steady supply of oil from Asia as tensions in the Middle East threaten global fuel stability. The federal g...

item.title: 40 People Fall Ill After Drinking Adulterated Toddy in Tamil Nadu, 4 Critical
item.description: At least 40 individuals, mostly local farm workers, have fallen seriously ill after consuming adulterated toddy in the Gundadam area of Tiruppur district, Tamil Nadu. The victims reported severe sympt...

item.title: Thousands take part in Kili Marathon 2026 in Moshi despite rain
item.description: Despite the heavy rains in Kilimanjaro Region, the 2026 Kilimanjaro International Marathon saw thousands of participants braving the weather to take part in the iconic event. Kenyan runner William Mor...

item.title: Family of Missing 84-Year-Old Nancy Guthrie Renews Appeal for Public Help in Ongoing Search
item.description: Nancy Guthrie, the 84-year-old mother of U.S. television anchor Savannah Guthrie, has been missing for seven weeks after disappearing from her home near Tucson, Arizona. Her family has issued a renewe...

item.title: LTO denies any unannounced increase in vehicle registration fees
item.description: The Land Transportation Office (LTO) has clarified that recent social media posts claiming a 100% increase in vehicle registration fees are false. In a statement on its Facebook page, the agency empha...

item.title: Indian Air Force employee arrested in Assam on suspicion of espionage for Pakistan
item.description: An employee of the Indian Air Force has been arrested in Assam on charges of allegedly spying for Pakistani handlers. According to reports, the individual was suspected of passing sensitive informatio...

item.title: Brisbane’s tourism revenue hits $17 billion driven by major events and domestic travel
item.description: Brisbane’s visitor economy reached an all-time high of $17 billion in 2025, thanks to a combination of international spending growth and strong domestic demand, according to Tourism Research Australia...

item.title: Manchester City triumphs in League Cup final over Arsenal with O’Reilly’s brace
item.description: Manchester City claimed their ninth League Cup title after defeating Arsenal 2-0 in the final on Sunday. Arsenal, who came into the match as favourites, failed to capitalise on their momentum and were...

item.title: Government lifts airfare caps as flight operations return to normal
item.description: The Central Government has withdrawn the airfare caps that were introduced in December last year after massive flight disruptions by IndiGo. These caps had been implemented to curb a sudden rise in ti...

item.title: Pickering Council Considers Residential Development Plan for Northeast Rural Lands
item.description: Advocates and local residents are urging Pickering city council to pause the proposed development of 1,600 hectares of rural land in the city’s northeast until more studies and consultations are condu...

item.title: Jim Michaelian, Key Figure Behind Long Beach Grand Prix, Passes Away at 83
item.description: Jim Michaelian, the pioneering race car driver and longtime president of the Long Beach Grand Prix Association, has passed away at the age of 83. Michaelian played a crucial role in transforming the a...
